runtime_tests: N/A: deferred documentation contract only for Phase 0/1

resources.name: WorkspacePool
resources.deferral_reason: Phase 1 needs one hermetic workspace per run and does not need fleet scheduling, lease balancing, or workspace reuse.
expected_invariants: A workspace lease belongs to one RunAttempt at a time.
Lease cleanup is idempotent.
Workspace provenance is tied to the RunBundle root digest.

resources.name: TaskClaim
resources.deferral_reason: Beads and Agent Mail handle current work claiming; Conveyor does not need an internal multi-tenant queue until it schedules work itself.
expected_invariants: Only one active claim may exist per Slice.
Expired claims do not grant write authority.
Claim transfer is recorded as an event.

resources.name: MergeQueueItem
resources.deferral_reason: Phase 1 produces PR-quality evidence but does not auto-merge or deploy, so merge queue state would be premature.
expected_invariants: Only gate-passing runs can seed queue candidates.
Human merge authority remains external.
Queue position changes are auditable.

resources.name: BudgetLedger
resources.deferral_reason: Phase 1 needs RunBudget stops and evidence, not a durable cross-run accounting ledger.
expected_invariants: Budget entries are append-only.
Overruns fail closed.
Manual overrides include actor, reason, and artifact references.

resources.name: AgentReputation
resources.deferral_reason: Phase 1 evaluates each run from recorded evidence and does not score long-lived agent identity quality.
expected_invariants: Reputation is derived from evidence, not model brand.
Scores are explainable.
Negative signals retain artifact references.

resources.name: Memory
resources.deferral_reason: Phase 1 avoids hidden agent memory; all usable context is explicit in RunSpec, ContextPack, and artifacts.
expected_invariants: Memory is opt-in.
Memory is provenance-bound and redactable.
Memory is never silently injected into implementation prompts.

resources.name: ExternalTaskRef
resources.deferral_reason: Phase 1 can cite external task identifiers in plans and reports without synchronizing external issue trackers.
expected_invariants: External refs are advisory.
Missing external systems do not block local replay.
Imported refs record source and timestamp.
